_comment: Flaky-input detection rules for the garage bench (Phase 7). PE-101/PE-102 are photo-eyes, PX-101 a prox switch on conveyor_1. transition_threshold/window_seconds are conservative starting points; tune per site. equipment_entity_id / signal_entity_id are kg_entities.id values for the Phase-8 KG proposal — left null here because the bench tenant's entities are seeded per-install; the detector writes an alert + ai_suggestion regardless, and opens a relationship_proposals edge only when both ids are present (build_proposal_spec). Populate them at seed time. stable_peers isolate a single flaky input from a plant-wide event.
